scripts.start:local-answer-api: npm run build:local-answer-api && npm run start -w @charity/local-answer-api
scripts.build:local-answer-api: npm run build -w @charity/export-core && npm run build -w @charity/local-answer-api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @charity/shared && npm run typecheck -w @charity/export-core && npm run typecheck -w @charity/live-api && npm run typecheck -w @charity/local-answer-api && npm run typecheck -w @charity/live-audience && npm run typecheck -w @charity/live-admin && npm run typecheck -w @charity/live-ops && npm run typecheck -w @charity/ops-agent && npm run typecheck -w @charity/export-worker
